blockers: Acceptance-grade evaluation requires an imported external bundle, but the active bundle is not external.

manifest.description: Curated confidence-judgment benchmark slice aligned to Confidence Database-style trial fields for deterministic repository evaluation.
notes: This repository slice is intentionally small and deterministic.
It is used to validate adapter, logging, and audit infrastructure rather than make publication-grade claims.
Default evaluation should use an external bundle; this repo copy is smoke-test-only.
Acceptance-grade confidence evaluation requires importing a real external bundle into the active benchmark registry.

blockers: Acceptance-grade evaluation requires an imported external bundle, but the active bundle is not external.
status_notes: Manifest marks the active bundle as smoke-test-only.
Import an external bundle into 'E:\workspace\segments\data\benchmarks\confidence_database' or point SEGMENTUM_BENCHMARK_ROOT at a registry containing one.
